ddls:
CREATE TABLE "etfs" (
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF */,
  "etf_name" TEXT /* Name of the ETF */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the ETF (e.g., Broad Equity, Equity) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ETF (e.g., USMV) */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the ETF issuer */,
  "fund_size" REAL /* Total fund size */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date the ETF was launched */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Is the ETF currently active? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type (e.g., Management Fee, Other Expenses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the expense type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_expenses" (
  "etf_expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF expense record */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF associated with the expense */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense type */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the expense */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the expense was reported */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Reporting period (e.g., annual, semi-annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etf_expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_expenses_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_expenses_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the ETF was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF associated with the report */,
  "total_management_fee" REAL /* Total management fee reported */,
  "total_other_expenses" REAL /* Total other expenses reported */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Reporting period (e.g., annual, semi-annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_reports_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_waivers" (
  "waiver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fee waiver */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF subject to the waiver */,
  "waiver_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the fee waived */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the waiver validity */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date of the waiver validity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fee waiver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waiver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_waivers_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the market condition record */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF affected by the market condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the market condition */,
  "impact_on_expenses" REAL /* Impact of the condition on ETF expenses in percentage */,
  "market_segment" TEXT /* Market segment affected by the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_conditions_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the expense history record */,
  "etf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF associated with the expense */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense type */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the expense during that period */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the expense was recorded */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Reporting period (e.g., annual, semi-annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_histories_etf_id FOREIGN KEY ("etf_id") REFERENCES etfs ("etf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_histories_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_officer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the review record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was performed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance officer performing the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_officer_reviews_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES expense_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_officer_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the audit record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being audited */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., login, data modification) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
